name: Tether
description:
Tether creates persistent visual connections between tokens on the Roll20 VTT.

KEY FEATURES:
• Connect two selected tokens with a dynamic PathV2 line
• Automatically redraws the connection when either token moves
• Supports multiple simultaneous tethers
• Automatically removes invalid tethers when tokens are deleted
• Update existing tethers by running the command again with new options
• Customize width, color, layer, and Dynamic Lighting barrier type
• Stores tether data in campaign state for persistence across API restarts

USAGE:
1. Select exactly two tokens
2. Run !tether to create a connection
3. Move either token and the tether updates automatically
4. Select the same two tokens and run !untether to remove the connection

OPTIONS:
!tether width|5 color|blue layer|objects type|transparent

SUPPORTED OPTIONS:
• width - Line thickness (default: 5)
• color - Named colors or hexadecimal values
• layer - objects, gmlayer, map, walls, foreground
• type - transparent, wall, or oneWay Dynamic Lighting barrier

PERFECT FOR:
Visualizing magical links, tethers, restraints, chains, leashes, spell effects, movable dynamic lighting barriers, and any other persistent connection between tokens.
